projects.name: Element Explorer API
projects.description: Build a REST API for exploring and filtering elements from the periodic table with advanced search capabilities.
projects.whatYouBuild: REST endpoints for element lookup, filtering by atomic number, mass, category, and other properties. Learn API design fundamentals.
projects.gettingStarted:
1. Load the periodic table data
2. Set up basic Express server
3. Implement search endpoints
4. Add filtering and sorting
5. Test with sample queries

projects.name: Todo API
projects.description: Create a full-featured Todo application API with user authentication, task management, and collaboration features.
projects.whatYouBuild: User authentication, task CRUD operations, sharing tasks with other users, marking tasks complete, organizing by lists.
projects.gettingStarted:
1. Create user and task tables
2. Implement authentication
3. Build task CRUD endpoints
4. Add task sharing
5. Test collaboration features

projects.name: Digital Music Store
projects.description: Build a music store platform with artists, albums, songs, playlists, and user ratings and reviews.
projects.whatYouBuild: Browse music by artist/album/genre, create playlists, rate/review songs, purchase tracks, streaming preview, recommendation engine.
projects.gettingStarted:
1. Design artist/album/song relationships
2. Implement music browsing
3. Add playlist creation
4. Build review system
5. Add recommendation engine

projects.name: Flight Booking System
projects.description: Develop a comprehensive flight booking platform with flights, bookings, payments, and seat management.
projects.whatYouBuild: Flight search, seat selection, booking management, payment processing, cancellations, refunds, loyalty program.
projects.gettingStarted:
1. Design flight/booking schema
2. Implement search functionality
3. Add seat management
4. Build booking engine
5. Implement payment processing

projects.name: Social Network Platform
projects.description: Create a social networking platform with users, posts, comments, likes, follows, and direct messaging.
projects.whatYouBuild: User profiles, post creation, comments, likes, follow system, newsfeed, direct messaging, notifications.
projects.gettingStarted:
1. Design user relationships
2. Build post/comment system
3. Implement like functionality
4. Add follow system
5. Build messaging system

projects.name: HR Management Portal
projects.description: Build an enterprise HR management system with employee records, payroll, benefits, and performance tracking.
projects.whatYouBuild: Employee directory, payroll management, benefits tracking, performance reviews, leave management, organizational hierarchy.
projects.gettingStarted:
1. Design organizational structure
2. Build employee management
3. Implement payroll system
4. Add performance tracking
5. Build leave management

projects.name: Banking System
projects.description: Develop a secure banking platform with accounts, transactions, transfers, loans, and regulatory compliance.
projects.whatYouBuild: Account management, transaction history, money transfers, loan management, interest calculation, compliance reporting, audit trails.
projects.gettingStarted:
1. Design account schema
2. Implement transaction logging
3. Build transfer system
4. Add loan management
5. Implement compliance tracking

projects.name: Recommendation Engine
projects.description: Create an AI-powered recommendation system that suggests products, content, or connections based on user behavior.
projects.whatYouBuild: User behavior tracking, preference learning, recommendation algorithms, A/B testing, analytics dashboard, collaborative filtering.
projects.gettingStarted:
1. Set up user/item tracking
2. Implement behavior logging
3. Build recommendation algorithm
4. Add analytics
5. Set up A/B testing

projects.name: Real-Time Chat Application
projects.description: Build a real-time messaging platform with users, conversations, messages, media sharing, and presence tracking.
projects.whatYouBuild: User conversations, message history, media attachments, typing indicators, read receipts, online presence, notification system.
projects.gettingStarted:
1. Design conversation schema
2. Set up WebSocket connection
3. Implement message storage
4. Add presence tracking
5. Build notification system

projects.name: Project Management Tool
projects.description: Develop a collaborative project management platform with tasks, teams, timelines, and progress tracking.
projects.whatYouBuild: Project creation, task management, team assignment, timelines, dependency tracking, progress reports, collaboration features.
projects.gettingStarted:
1. Design project hierarchy
2. Build task system
3. Implement team management
4. Add timeline tracking
5. Build collaboration features
